data.title: Cute Home & Kitchen Accessories | Pretty Little Home

issues.impact: Search engines use H1s to understand what your page is about. You're invisible.
issues.fix: Add exactly one H1 per page that clearly describes the page content

issues.impact: Your links look terrible when shared on Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook. Broken thumbnail = low click rates.
issues.fix: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url to every page

issues.impact: Invisible to screen readers and search engines. You're losing Google Images traffic.
issues.fix: Add descriptive alt text to every image. Be specific, include keywords where natural.

summary: We analyzed www.prettylittlehome.co.uk and found 3 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
